description: Pack of two pairs of ankle length socks in pink, white and blackMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneRib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitWear these cute socks with trainers when you're working out or to keep your feet comfortable when wearing formal shoes and trousers.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
